Commercial Cleaning & Janitorial Services in the Bronx

Headquartered right here in the Bronx. Local teams, same-day emergency response, and JaniTrack-verified cleaning for schools, offices, churches, healthcare, and government facilities.

Schedule a Free Walkthrough → 347-332-9348
✓Bronx-Based HQ
✓MBE / MWBE Certified
✓Same-Day Emergency
✓80+ Professionals

GreenPoint Maintenance Services Corp is not a Manhattan company sending crews uptown — we are headquartered in the Bronx. Our teams live here, work here, and know every neighborhood from Fordham to Pelham Bay, Riverdale to Mott Haven, Throggs Neck to Parkchester. When your facility needs same-day emergency cleaning or a 6 AM crew before school opens, our proximity matters.

We serve Bronx schools, churches, medical offices, daycares, government buildings, and commercial offices with dedicated janitorial programs built for each facility type. Every cleaning session is verified through JaniTrack — timestamped photos, GPS-tagged task completion, and ATP bioluminescence testing that gives facility managers audit-ready documentation, not just a promise that someone showed up.

As a certified Minority Business Enterprise with $2M+ insurance coverage and SAM.gov registration, GreenPoint meets the procurement requirements for school districts, municipal agencies, healthcare networks, and religious institutions across the Bronx and the wider NYC metro area. One vendor for cleaning and facility maintenance — fixed pricing, no surprises, no excuses.

What's Included

Commercial Janitorial

Daily, weekly, and monthly cleaning programs for offices, lobbies, restrooms, and common areas. Customized scope of work with fixed pricing and JaniTrack verification.

School & Educational Cleaning

CDC-compliant janitorial for Bronx K-12 schools, charter schools, and educational facilities. Green Seal products, cafeteria deep cleaning, summer restoration programs.

House of Worship Cleaning

Sanctuary care, fellowship hall event turnaround, nursery sanitization. Flexible scheduling around worship services, events, and religious holidays.

Medical & Healthcare Cleaning

OSHA-compliant sanitization for exam rooms, waiting areas, and clinical spaces. ATP-verified surface disinfection for healthcare compliance standards.

Floor Care & Restoration

VCT strip and refinish, carpet extraction, marble and stone polishing, hardwood maintenance. Scheduled programs or one-time deep cleans.

Post-Construction Cleanup

Three-stage construction cleanup for Bronx renovation and new build projects. Dust removal, window cleaning, floor prep. Move-in ready in 48 hours.

Why Facility Managers Choose GreenPoint

Bronx-Based Headquarters
Local presence means faster response, same-day emergency availability, and a team that knows Bronx buildings, neighborhoods, and facility challenges firsthand.
JaniTrack Verification
Every cleaning session documented with timestamped photos, GPS tagging, and ATP bioluminescence testing. Real-time dashboard access for facility managers.
MBE / MWBE Certified
Registered Minority Business Enterprise qualified for diversity procurement with NYC, NYS, and federal agencies. SAM.gov registered, NAICS 561720.
Dedicated Local Teams
Same background-checked, Bronx-based crew assigned to your facility every visit. Consistency, accountability, and familiarity your staff can rely on.

Frequently Asked Questions

Yes — headquartered right here. Our local presence means faster response times, same-day emergency service, and crews who know the borough's facilities and building types.

Schools, charter schools, churches, medical offices, daycares, government buildings, and commercial offices. From Fordham to Pelham Bay, Riverdale to Mott Haven.

Same-day emergency response for Bronx facilities — flood cleanup, post-event turnaround, biohazard, and urgent deep cleans. Average response under 4 hours for existing clients.

Yes — all five boroughs plus Westchester, NJ, CT, PA, and FL. But the Bronx is home base, so you get the fastest response times in the borough.

MBE/MWBE certified through NYC and NYS, SAM.gov registered, $2M+ insured. Full documentation package available for school district and municipal procurement.

Get a Free Facility Assessment in the Bronx

We'll walk your facility, build a customized cleaning program, and deliver a fixed-price proposal within 48 hours. Local team. No obligation.
